paper_title: Object Detection using Event Camera: A MoE Heat Conduction based Detector and A New Benchmark Dataset
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (, PIL, __future__, builtins, community, contextlib, cv2, einops, fvcore, importlib (+19 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: MvHeatDET/requirements.txt, CvHeat-DET/requirements.txt
